pi_items.source: task.json description field and setup_task.sh cleanup logic confirm this is synthetic test data

Web search confirmed this is the real routing number for JPMorgan Chase Bank, NA in Tampa, FL (https://www.usbanklocations.com/routing-number-021000021.html), but used as test data in synthetic environment
task.json description and setup_task.sh confirm this is synthetic test data created for task
task.json description specifies this account number; no public records found for this number, indicating synthetic test data
iDempiere API documentation (https://jenkins-artifacts.idempiere.org/javadocdev/org/compiere/model/X_C_BP_BankAccount.html) confirms that 'C' is the valid code for Checking account type in iDempiere
ISO 4217 standard (https://www.iso.org/iso-4217-currency-codes.html) confirms USD is the correct currency code for US Dollar

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a new bank record in iDempiere's GardenWorld test database with the name 'Metro City Bank' and routing number 021000021 (the real JPMorgan Chase Bank routing number used in test context). A bank account is created under this bank with account number 888999000, name 'Payroll Checking', type 'C' (Checking account), and currency USD. All metadata values are verified: the bank and account names are synthetic test data, the routing number is real but used for testing, the account number is synthetic, and the account type code 'C' correctly represents 'Checking' in iDempiere's system, with 'USD' being the correct ISO 4217 currency code.
